prior_outcome: L2 template channel genuinely positive (the campaign's best-validated structure) but site-dependent and never packaged as a restoration deliverable
material_difference: A formula-profile HMM as an epigraphic RESTORATION TOOL - calibrated lacuna-fill distributions over token-types/slots, scored on artificially damaged held-out inscriptions across sites, with abstention - is a new deliverable on a validated channel: OBS-04 tested one direction on notation-type only, and no prior instance produced editor-usable restorations with uncertainty. Hard caps to inherit: restores SLOTS/notation-types, never readings (L2; STRUCTURAL licence NOT_EARNED per OBS-05); site-dependence is the known failure mode; KU-RO/terminal-total and libation-order grammars are the only cross-site-robust profiles to build on.
